session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/tui/ tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20 ```
Report whether all tests passed, the total count, or list any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on tui and plan_data_provider tests, show last 20 lines

session.tool_result:
row = provider._build_row_data( plan=plan, plan_id=42, pr_linkages={}, workflow_run=None, worktree_by_plan_id={}, use_graphite=False, )
# Node 1.1 is next (pending depends on it, but 1.1 is in_progress so # find_graph_next_node falls back to it). Its own PR should appear. > assert len(row.objective_head_plans) == 1 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'PlanRowData' object has no attribute 'objective_head_plans'. Did you mean: 'objective_deps_plans'?
tests/tui/data/test_provider.py:1721: AttributeError =========================== short test summary info ============================ FAILED tests/tui/data/test_provider.py::TestBlockingDepsPlans::test_next_node_own_pr_collected - AttributeError: 'PlanRowData' object has no attribute 'objective_head_plans'. Did you mean: 'objective_deps_plans'? !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
**Test Results: FAILURE**
1 test failed: - **File**: `tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` - **Test**: `TestBlockingDepsPlans::test_next_node_own_pr_collected` - **Line**: 1721 - **Error**: `AttributeError: 'PlanRowData' object has no attribute 'objective_head_plans'. Did you mean: 'objective_deps_plans'?`
The test is attempting to access `row.objective_head_plans` but the `PlanRowData` object only has `objective_deps_plans` attribute. This is a breaking change in the data structure that needs to be addressed.
